voices.name: Rachel Moyle
voices.description: Bright and bouncy with an infectious East Coast energy. Rachel's the one you reach for when a brief needs to feel genuinely alive rather than just upbeat.

voices.name: James Oakley
voices.description: Grounded West Country storytelling with a conversational ease that makes even dry copy feel human. Strong documentary and e-learning track record including NHS, Tesco Mobile, and Cycling Scotland.

voices.name: John Campbell
voices.description: Natural East Coast instincts and a real flair for character work. John's unfussy delivery cuts through without trying too hard.

voices.name: Ali Halkett
voices.description: Gentle and deeply characterful, with a measured pace that earns the listener's trust. Works equally well narrating or selling — credits include Goldfish Mobile and corporate narration.

voices.name: Penny Cobham
voices.description: That slightly husky warmth is rare and producers know it. Penny's East Coast intimacy works especially well in e-learning and health campaigns where tone really counts.

voices.name: Jenni Wales
voices.description: Credits include Cycling Scotland, smoking cessation campaigns, and early learning — which tells you everything about her range of register. Bright, bubbly West Coast energy with real depth beneath it.

voices.name: Donald Sinclair
voices.description: Gaelic speaker with a gritty North West Scots authenticity that no amount of performance coaching can manufacture. First choice for whisky, heritage, BA, and anything distinctly Scottish.

voices.name: Finlay Allan
voices.description: Rich and warm with a North East Scots quality that feels genuinely caring rather than performed. Credits include Tesco Mobile, smoking cessation, and character work.

voices.name: Rod Kennard
voices.description: Deep, precise English RP with gravitas to spare. Rod fronts Glenlivet and Kingfisher — that should tell you the kind of brands that reach for him.

voices.name: Klaudia Bitner
voices.description: Native Polish and German speaker with a youthful, fun English delivery on top. Rare trilingual range that makes her invaluable for European campaigns.

voices.name: Rory Mason
voices.description: Easy American warmth with a storytelling quality that never feels like it's trying. Credits include US Power and The Kingfisher alongside strong commercial and corporate work.

voices.name: Kenneth Gray
voices.description: Measured and authoritative with real documentary experience. Kenneth's delivered for John Lewis and Scottish health campaigns — dependable range across the board.

voices.name: Jed Potts
voices.description: Cool without effort. Jed's East Coast read on Scottish Libraries and Loch Morlich show he's equally comfortable with the poetic and the practical.

voices.name: Camille Marmié

voices.name: Dylan Neilson
voices.description: Credits include Police Scotland and SNBTS. Dylan's contemporary East Coast delivery has a quiet authority that public sector clients return to repeatedly.

voices.name: Lis Faulkner
voices.description: Fife-born with a clear, trustworthy quality and serious experience — Glenlivet, NHS Recruitment, and corporate narration among her credits. Reliable and real.

voices.name: Andrew Rothney
voices.description: Thoughtful and measured East Coast delivery with strong documentary and e-learning credentials. One of those voices that gets out of the way of the content.

voices.name: Roy Entwistle

voices.name: Kim Chapman

voices.name: Barbara Smale

voices.name: Danielle Warwick

voices.name: Ian Crocker

voices.name: Adeola Ogayemi

voices.name: Ronan Doyle

voices.name: Dominica Warburton
